name: Jump Pad
description: An interactive physics-based launcher that applies impulse forces to objects on collision, propelling them into the air. Offers sophisticated control modes for both strength and angle: fixed values, random ranges, or movement-based dynamic calculation. Features cooldown prevention and orientation-aware impulse direction. KEY FEATURES:
documentation:
## Jump Pad
Launch the player into the air on collision.

### Strength
- **Strength Mode** - Fixed, Random, or Movement Based
- **Strength** - Base launch force
- **Max Strength** - Upper limit for random/movement modes

### Angle
- **Enable Angle** - Apply directional launch
- **Angle Mode** - Fixed, Random, or Movement Based
- **Angle** - Launch direction (-90 to 90 degrees)
- **Min/Max Angle** - Range for random/movement modes

### Tips
- Place on flat surfaces the player will walk over
- Movement Based mode launches harder when player is running
- Combine with Visual Effect for launch particles
author: stemstudio

strengthMode.name: Strength Mode
strengthMode.description: How the launch force is determined. Fixed uses a constant value, Random picks from a range, and Movement Based scales with the player's speed.

strength.name: Strength
strength.description: Base launch force applied to the player. In random/movement modes, this acts as the minimum strength.

maxStrength.name: Max Strength
maxStrength.description: Used for random and movement modes

enableAngle.name: Enable Angle
enableAngle.description: When enabled, applies a directional angle to the launch instead of launching straight up.

angleMode.name: Angle Mode
angleMode.description: How the launch angle is determined. Fixed uses a constant angle, Random picks from a range, and Movement Based adjusts based on the player's velocity.

angle.name: Angle
angle.description: Launch direction in degrees relative to the pad's orientation. 0 is straight up, negative tilts one way and positive tilts the other.

minAngle.name: Min Angle
minAngle.description: Used for random and movement modes

maxAngle.name: Max Angle
maxAngle.description: Used for random and movement modes
